instructions: When surfacing known issues, check all related code paths for the same class of bug â€” the dotfile glob issue affected copy, lock, and verify steps, not just copy
Validation requirements must be visible in user-facing templates â€” invisible validation rules cause avoidable failures
Use PowerShell New-Item -ItemType Junction for directory junctions on Windows â€” cmd mklink /D fails with spaces in paths from bash
Use PowerShell or .NET methods for ALL Windows filesystem operations involving paths with spaces â€” cmd //c consistently fails for mklink, rmdir, and attrib
Junction removal: use [System.IO.Directory]::Delete() via PowerShell â€” cmd rmdir fails with spaces, PowerShell Remove-Item throws NullReferenceException on junctions
